allDescriptions: LEWA is a worldwide leading manufacturer of diaphragm metering pumps, process pumps, complete metering systems and plants. The company was founded in 1952. We have grown since our founding in 1952 and are now represented by 14 subsidiaries and over 80 sales partners on every continent. LEWA offers customized solutions, with a focus on taking a comprehensive approach to pump and system integration and on the process itself. LEWA’s core expertise includes first class service and spare part distribution in aftersales combined with many years of experience in the international project management.
LEWA designs and manufactures metering and process pumps, metering devices, and systems for fluid metering.

LEWA designs and manufactures metering and process pumps, metering devices, and systems for fluid metering. It offers metering, process, centrifugal, and air operated pumps, as well as pump navigators; chemical injection packages; pump skids; bellows pulsators; odorizing systems; chromatography and blowing agent metering systems; and customized production units and metering systems. The company offers products for additive metering for plastics, amine treatment, process chromatography, fabric softener, corrosion inhibitor, inline caustic dilution, methanol injection, waste water wet oxidation, polyethylene production, foaming agent metering, supercritical fluid, H2S and CO2 injection applications in oil and gas, gas odorization, refinery, petrochemical, chemical, plastic, personal care, cleaning and detergent, pharma and biotech, food and beverage, energy utility, and other industries. LEWA was founded in 1952 and is based in Leonberg, Germany with representatives and sales offices in Germany and internationally.
Company

LEWA is a manufacturer of diaphragm metering pumps, process pumps as well as customized metering systems and production units. The company has developed from a pure technology provider to a solution provider over the last years. LEWA systems are in use in oil & gas and chemical industry.

LEWA GmbH manufactures diaphragm metering and process diaphragm pumps, as well as complete metering systems. The Company offers solutions to oil and gas, refineries, chemicals, plastics, food and beverages, and petrochemical industry. LEWA also provides services including consulting, project management, engineering, and maintenance services. LEWA serves customers worldwide.

LEWA is a world-leading brand offering metering pumps, process diaphragm pumps, and complete metering systems. We produce cutting-edge engineering solutions to fulfil a vast array of metering, conveyance and mixing requirements. With our innovative technologies critical to safety and efficiency, we support our customers in the production of petrochemicals, chemicals and detergents, plastics, cosmetics, and the pharmaceutical and food & beverage sectors. Other specialist applications include biotechnology, energy solutions, and gas odorization. 

LEWA is part of the Atlas Copco Group, a globally leading Swedish industrial corporation for compressed air and vacuum solutions, energy solutions, dewatering and industrial pumps, industrial power tools and assembly and machine vision solutions.

LEWA Australia Pty Ltd is a sales office located in Perth handling Australia and Oceania regions’ markets.

As a pump and systems provider, we are specialized in metering pumps, process diaphragm pumps, pump packages, chemical injection packages and production units applicable to various industries of your need including oil & gas, mining, petrochemical, refineries, dairy and the general industry.
Please do not hesitate to contact us for more information and solution on you needs.

Together with Atlas Copco Group, LEWA will further expand its industrial pump business.

entity.description: CIMS provides automated optical inspection solutions dedicated to enhancing production processes and yield in Printed Circuit Board (PCB), High Density Interconnect PCB (HDI PCB), Flex and Rigid-flex PCB and IC Substrates.CIMS addresses specific needs of all segments of PCB manufacturing industry with dedicated solutions based on advanced imaging and image processing technologies. CIMS solutions are applied to wide range of applications across those segments at multiple stages of PCB manufacturing process.
allDescriptions: Cims is one of the global market leaders in PCB(printed circuit board) automatic optical inspection(AVI).

CIMS provides automated optical inspection solutions dedicated to enhancing production processes and yield in Printed Circuit Board (PCB), High Density Interconnect PCB (HDI PCB), Flex and Rigid-flex PCB and IC Substrates.CIMS addresses specific needs of all segments of PCB manufacturing industry with dedicated solutions based on advanced imaging and image processing technologies. CIMS solutions are applied to wide range of applications across those segments at multiple stages of PCB manufacturing process.

CIMS provides automated optical inspection solutions, automated final/visual inspection solutions, metrology and add-on inspection options, system upgrade solutions as well as technical support and service dedicated to enhancing production processes and yield in Printed Circuit Board (PCB), High Density Interconnect PCB (HDI PCB), Flex and Rigid-flex PCB and IC Substrates.

CIMS addresses specific needs of all segments of PCB (including IC substrates) manufacturing industry with dedicated solutions based on advanced imaging and image processing technologies. CIMS solutions are applied to wide range of applications across those segments at multiple stages of PCB manufacturing process.

allDescriptions: K | Lens is a high-tech start-up developing a product range based on its proprietary multiview light-field technology

K | Lens is a tech start-up developing a product range based on the K|Lens technology, their innovative and patented image acquisition and processing technology. K|Lens technology has been invented at the Max-Planck-Institute for Informatics at Saarland University and further developed during an incubation period with IT Inkubator .

K|Lens pushes automated optical inspection with its customizable machine vision systems that focus on robustness, speed and traceability. Our unique combination of compact light field sensors and multiview AI provide unparalleled optical inspection for inline quality control.

We are a spin-off of the Max-Planck Institute for Computer Science and the University of Saarland in Germany. Our team is made up of experts in the fields of photonics and computer vision software engineering. We develop solutions based on our proprietary and patent-protected technology. We are also open to collaborations on alternative, scalable, software-based photonics products. Note: - This project has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No 954933 - This project has received funding from the German Federal Ministry of Education and Research

We develop a lightfield lens based on our proprietary hardware and software solution allowing to record depth information with any digital camera. Our first product is directed to enthusiasts and pro-photographers and will allow for depth-based image editing opening up a new dimension in creative image composition.


Note:
- This project has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No 954933

entity.name: PlatiScan
entity.description: PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection.
allDescriptions: PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection.

PlatiScan VI Automated Optical Inspection

Mit PlatiScan VI wurde ein neuartiges optisches Inspektionssystem (engl. visual inspection system) entwickelt.

Das System besteht aus einem handelsüblichen Windows-PC auf dem unsere spezielle Software installiert ist, die zur Auswertung der Bilder dient und die Bilderfassung wird realisiert durch eine herkömmliche Digitalkamera in einer individuell gewünschten Konfiguration als "Standalone" oder "Integrated" System.

Unser PlatiScan VI System wurde der menschlichen Vorgehensweise einer manuellen Sichtprüfung nachgebildet, so kann eine manuelle Sichtprüfung per Computer automatisiert werden. Hierdurch wird die Fehlererkennungsrate und die gesamte Testabdeckung deutlich erhöht.

Unter anderem sind bereits heute folgende Applikationen realisiert worden:

    * Board-Check
    * LED-Check
    * Display-Check
    * Jet-Test

Natürlich sind mit dem PlatiScan VI System auch andere Anwendungsgebiete möglich.
Sprechen Sie uns doch einfach heute noch an und lassen Sie sich über die Lösung Ihrer individuellen Testbedürfnisse beraten.

entity.name: Worldwide Quality Control
entity.description:
ABOUT US 
Worldwide Quality Control (formerly Asia Quality Control) was established in 2011 with a clear vision in mind: to deliver top-notch quality inspection services that help businesses achieve their quality goals and maximize their global market success. 

With over more than 10 years of industry experience, our team of engineering experts is committed to providing the highest quality services to our clients in 

OUR SERVICES
# Our Quality Inspection Services:
•	Pre-production Inspections: We scrutinize raw materials, components, and processes before production commences to prevent costly errors.
•	In-process Inspections: We monitor the manufacturing process to ensure consistent product quality throughout production.
•	Pre-shipment Inspections: We perform thorough quality checks before shipment to avoid costly returns and recalls.
•	Production Monitoring: We perform day to day monitoring of your production
•	Defectives Sorting: We perform sorting of defectives products on your proudction line.


# Our Supplier Audit Services:
•	Supplier Qualification Audits: We assess supplier capabilities to meet your quality and compliance requirements.
•	Supplier Performance Audits: We conduct regular audits to ensure suppliers maintain their quality standards.
•	Compliance Audits: We ensure suppliers adhere to all industry standards and regulatory requirements.

# Our other Services:
- Defects Root Cause Analysis and Resolution
- Quality Control checklist establishment

# Product Testing & Certification
- Lab Testing
- Product Certification

# Industries:
Automotives, Railway, Aerospace, Technical and Industrial, Electronic, Mechanical Parts, Building and Construction, Medical Devices and Supplies, Food, Consumer  

CONTACT US
If you are in search of reliable quality inspection services in Worldwide, Worldwide Quality Control is here to assist you.

entity.description: ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based systems for automated visual inspection and predictive analytics in industrial environments. The company offers defect detection solutions that optimize Cognex ViDi and Halcon MVTec configurations from customer OK/NOK image sets using an unsupervised hyperoptimization approach. Its AIS platform supports deployment of automatic optical inspection systems with configurable hardware such as lenses, cameras, inkers, and illumination. The portfolio includes MAP Pilot for image collection and MAP Inspect for manual image tagging and labeling by client quality teams or Athenais specialists.

allDescriptions: ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based automated optical inspection, defect detection, and predictive analytics systems for industrial applications.

ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based systems for automated visual inspection and predictive analytics in industrial environments. The company offers defect detection solutions that optimize Cognex ViDi and Halcon MVTec configurations from customer OK/NOK image sets using an unsupervised hyperoptimization approach. Its AIS platform supports deployment of automatic optical inspection systems with configurable hardware such as lenses, cameras, inkers, and illumination. ATHENAIS SA also provides predictive analytics tools for anomaly detection in IoT and other operational signals. The portfolio includes MAP Pilot for image collection and MAP Inspect for manual image tagging and labeling by client quality teams or Athenais specialists.

Welcome to the new era of Automated Optical Inspection with deep learning.
contact@athenais.tech

Athenais Defects Detection and Predictive Analytics Systems
** Enhance your productivity with our Cognex Vidi / Halcon MvTec HyperOptimization software
- From your OK/NOK set of images our unsupervised HyperOptimization system will find the best Vidi or Halcon solution
- An AI driven approach that will beat all others parameters search.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
** Deploy your Automatic Optical Inspection system with our AIS plateform
- The lowest COO of AOI systems worlwide thanks to the Open Hardware concept
- Automatic turret with Mitutoyo BF/DF lens, APC Basler Camera, Xandex Inker and totally configurable illuminations
- MapPilot Client server architecture compatible with Cognex Vidi / Vision Pro and Halcon MvTec
- Capture images, detect defects, measure and inspect automatically
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Looking for anomalies signal detection in your IOT/System?

allDescriptions: SYNERGX Technologies Inc. is a leading global supplier of automated optical inspection machines for the glass industry.
Company in Laval, Canada

WHO WE ARE

World-leading provider of non-contact inspection and metrology solutions designed to optimize glass manufacturing processes . Worldwide coverage with systems installed in over 30 countries

WHAT WE DO

SYNERGX offers a complete and integrated platform for each stage in the glass production process as well as individual systems to address specific inspection challenges.
Our systems inspect glass surface quality, edge precision, dimensional measurement, glass transmittance, and structural integrity. With user-friendly software and systems expertise, we help the top glass manufacturers worldwide to optimize their production process and minimize the defect rates beyond what is possible with manual inspection.

WHAT DEFINES US

SYNERGX strives to follow those three core values:

	Quality is what we build
	Precision in everything we pursue
	Innovation that drives us

The future of optical glass inspection starts here. 

ABOUT OUR TEAM 

Since 2004, we have built our reputation on the quality of our team. Across our organization of over 14 different nationalities, our values continue to be the center of our culture. We take pride in providing a work environment either in research & development or in operations where our employees travel across the world to support our customers.

Join our team a rapidly growing industrial tech company today!  For more details on job opportunities, visit us at www.synergx.com.

entity.description: SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. Until now this has never been achieved and it will ensure Europe’s leading role in agricultural robotics.  In modern greenhouses there is a high demand to automate labour. The availability of a skilled workforce that accepts repetitive tasks in the harsh climate conditions of a greenhouse is decreasing rapidly. The current state of the art in automated harvesting of fruits and vegetables has remained remarkably stationary in the past decades. In the EU-FP7-project CROPS (www.crops-robots.eu) extensive research has been performed on agricultural robotics. One of the applications was a sweet pepper harvesting robot. SWEEPER will use the technology developed in CROPS to introduce, test and validate a robotic harvesting solution for sweet pepper under real-world conditions.  The project involves 6 partners from 4 different countries (The Netherlands, Belgium, Sweden and Israel). The consortium consist out of fundamental and applied research organisations, a system integrator and a modern grower of sweet pepper. In the consortium a wide-range of disciplines are available, including: horticulture, horticultural engineering, machine vision, sensing, robotics, control, intelligent systems, software architecture, system integration and greenhouse crop management.

The consortium consist out of fundamental and applied research organisations, a system integrator and a modern grower of sweet pepper. In the consortium a wide-range of disciplines are available, including: horticulture, horticultural engineering, machine vision, sensing, robotics, control, intelligent systems, software architecture, system integration and greenhouse crop management.

allDescriptions: HANZA is a fast growing industrial business partner within manufacturing.

HANZA Group are a global industrial business partner within manufacturing. They have learned that, in order to be successful in this industry, you can not only focus on production. You need to understand how to improve the existing business of your customers. They have taken all their knowledge and experience and developed a concept they call MIG™. By using this concept together with their full range of manufacturing solutions (mechanics, electronics, cables and final assembly) they offer a partnership that will increase growth and profitability for every customer. It doesn’t end here. By combining the minds of more than 2800 brilliant co-workers you will engage a strong, creative and strategic partner that continuously will be ahead of the game.

Hanza AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, provides contract manufacturing solutions in Sweden, Finland, Estonia, Germany, Poland, the Czech Republic, rest of the European Union, Norway, rest of Europe, North America, and internationally. It operates through Main Markets, Other Markets, and Business Development and Services segments. The company offers machining solutions comprising grinding, turbine component, milling, turning, electrical discharge machining, assembly, logistics, and prototype services; sheet metal processing solutions consisting of punching and laser cutting, bending, welding, coating, and surface treatment services; heavy mechanics solutions, such as welding TIG/MIG, machining, and cutting technologies solutions; and electronics manufacturing solutions, including research and development, printed circuit board assembly, and research and development test development center services. It also provides wire harness solutions comprising automated cut-strip-crimp wire processing, cut and strip technology, crimp tool, low- and high-pressure molding of cables, cable and label marking, multi-channel testing, and ultrasonic welding services, as well as laser engraving, pad printing, and hot stamping for plastic parts; and assembly solutions, including design and development, test development, and design and adaptation services. In addition, the company offers business consulting; and tech solutions, including development projects, electronics, mechanics, and software. Hanza AB (publ) was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Kista, Sweden.

Hanza AB is a Sweden-based company operating as an industrial business partner providing manufacture services. It provides complete manufacture solutions in the areas of mechanics, electronics, cable harnesses and final assembly. The Company has two segments: Mechanics, further divided into the Light Mechanics division; and the Heavy Mechanics division; and Electronics, further divided into Printed Circuit Board (PCB), which offers assembly of both flexible boards and large PCBs, KA Elektronik AB, as well as services such as automated optical inspection and testing, and Technology cabling, which manufactures and supplies cables for all applications. The department Business Solutions involves strategy, business development, marketing and business implementation of Hanza AB's concepts. The Company operates in Sweden, Finland, Estonia, Poland, Slovakia and China. Its customers include Atlas Copco, Ericsson, ABB, and Saab Defense.

HANZA AB operates as a streamlining contract manufacturing. The Company manufactures and distributes machine tools, sheet metal, PCB assembly, and electronic cables for manufacturing companies. HANZA serves customers worldwide.

HANZA jest w pełni uniwersalną agencją interaktywną. Oferuje kompleksowe rozwiązania internetowe - od kreacji, pomysłów, nieszablonowej grafiki po rozwiązania technologiczne, zarządzanie projektami i ich późniejszą obsługę. Prowadzimy kampanie marketingowe oraz pozycjonowanie serwisów w wyszukiwarkach. Internet nie ma przed nami wielu tajemnic.

HANZA is a global knowledge-based manufacturing company that modernizes and streamlines the manufacturing industry.
Through production facilities with various manufacturing technologies grouped into local clusters as well as advisory services,
we create shorter lead times, more environmentally friendly processes and increased profitability for our customers.
This means we are contributing to a better and more sustainable future.

The company was founded in 2008 and today has sales exceeding SEK 2 billion, with operations in Sweden, Germany, Finland, Estonia, Poland,
the Czech Republic and China. Among our clients you find leading companies such as ABB, Epiroc, Getinge, Oerlikon, Saab and Siemens.

We are operating in six HANZA Clusters, offering many different manufacturing technologies:
PCBA, cable harnesses, turning, sheet metal mechanics, milling, heavy mechanincs, surface treatment, powder coating, welding, assembly, testing, design & engineering services and more.
We have ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 3834-2, OHSAS 18001, TS 13485 and AS 9100 certified factories.

Awards:
HANZA appointed Supplier of the year by 3M (2019)
HANZA Mechanics Tartu “Supplier Excellence Award in a fight against Covid-19\' by PerkinElmer (2020)

Hanza AB provides professional engineering services. The Company offers mechanics and electronics related services including turning, milling, sheet metal production, surface mounting, and inspection. Hanza serves customers throughout Europe.

Vaasa Mechanics Oy, doing business as HANZA Mechanics Finland, Oy, manufactures and assembles sheet metal mechanics. The Company produces a range of solutions contributing to its parent's product offering using various processes including turretpunching, bending, excentric pressing, automatic pressing, and welding. HANZA Mechanics Finland serves customers throughout Scandinavia.

HANZA is a global knowledge-based manufacturing company that modernizes and streamlines the manufacturing industry. Through production facilities with various manufacturing technologies grouped into local clusters as well as advisory services, we create shorter lead times, more environmentally friendly processes and increased profitability for our customers. The company was founded in 2008 and has since 2019 had sales exceeding SEK 2 billion. The company has six manufacturing clusters; Sweden, Finland, Germany, Baltics, Central Europe and China. Among HANZA’s clients are leading companies such as 3M, ABB, Epiroc, GE, Getinge, John Deere, SAAB, Sandvik, Siemens and Tomra. Our factories are strategically located geographically close to each other, in so-called manufacturing clusters, to create synergies between the various technologies such as shorter lead times, fewer transports, reduced emissions and lower total costs. With a total of 130,000 square meters of production area divided between 17 factories and 7 factory parks in Europe and Asia, we offer complete manufacturing in electronics, machining, sheet metal mechanics, heavy mechanics, wire harnesses and complex assembly services. Our manufacturing clusters bring together state-of-the-art machines for virtually all production needs. We always strive to minimize costs, shorten lead times and reduce environmental impact, primarily by increasing efficiency and reducing the need for transport. A high degree of automation and flexibility means that we can handle both smaller and larger volumes. We have ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 3834-2, ISO 27001, ISO 13485 and AS 9100 certified factories. entity.description: Affix Engineering provides engineering services focused on industrial robot programming, machine vision solutions, AI and autonomous systems, and process optimization. The company programs robots from multiple brands for applications such as welding, pick and place, palletizing, assembly, and material handling. It designs and integrates 2D and 3D machine vision for inspection, quality control, bin picking, flex feeding, conveyor tracking, and depalletizing. Affix Engineering also develops custom software and AI-based automation to support decision-making and intelligent systems. Its engineers work with system integrators, machine builders, and end customers across sectors including automotive, food, technology, aerospace, pharmaceuticals, logistics, wood, and metalworking.

entity.summary: Specialist in robotics and machine vision
allDescriptions:
Affix Engineering is a specialist in programming industrial robots and has a goal to make the use of robots easier and more accessible. With years of experience and in-depth knowledge in the field of robotics and machine vision, Affix Engineering is able give everyone the tools and expertise for robot automation and machine vision. 

This is especially of great value for small and medium-sized businesses (MKB), where companies often do not have sufficient experience with robots and vision equipment. Because Affix also supports and advises the smaller and less wealthy companies in the implementation of automation solutions, these companies (including integrators and machine builders) can enjoy new and innovative technical solutions without any worries.

We are brand independent and familiar with most brands and systems. Through the development of software packages and various R&D processes, we are used to complex tasks, we can solve problems, improve processes and work with other people's software.

With approximately 8 programmers, Affix is working on various large and small projects for different customers in all imaginable branches, including: Automotive, Food, Technology, Aerospace, Pharmaceuticals, Logistics, Metal, ... . By working together as a team, with each other and with our partners, Affix is from the beginning of a project a real addition.

entity.description: Qtechnology designs and manufactures customised smart cameras and develop complete machine vision systems that are tailored to our clients' application-specific needs. With mechanics, electrical, software, and science resources in-house, we can develop complete system designs. In some projects, we handle full OEM projects from idea to system implementation, while assisting during part of the development process or simply supplying smart cameras in other projects. With experience from several industries and thousands of cameras installed worldwide, we understand the requirements for quality and reliability to keep factories running 24/7/365. Our smart cameras have been exploited to design novel vision systems within a range of application fields. Some typical application fields include factory automatization, sorting and grading, gauging and tracking, pattern recognition, medical diagnostics, visual inspection, quality control, guidance, object categorization, and mechanical diagnostics. Qtechnology cameras are high-quality, intelligent single and multi-channel CCD and CMOS cameras, for industrial applications. Our camera products range from monochrome, colour and multichannel CCD/CMOS cameras resolutions to several megapixels matrix cameras. For high colour accuracy and multispectral applications including UV, NIR, LWIR, etc., we also offer 3CCD and 5CCD cameras with dichroic prism technology. Finally, we also develop solutions based on x-ray and microbolometer imaging technology. Qtechnology is a subsidiary within the Newtec Group.

The company develops individual robot cells, testing stations, and fully integrated production lines that cover production and manufacturing, material flow and intralogistics, and quality assurance and testing. Its systems include mobile robots, cobots, industrial robots, AI-supported visual inspection, rails and traversing axes, and complete robot cells and lines. Robotec Solutions serves electronics and semiconductors, plastics, food, luxury goods and watches, medtech and pharma, and the metal industry. allDescriptions: A vida continua mais doce
QUISS AG, the company specializes in machine vision solutions.
QUISS AG, the company specializes in machine vision solutions for quality inspection and robot guidance, and is mainly used in the automotive industry.

Seit 1988 ist die QUISS AG ein verlässlicher Partner für die Entwicklung und Umsetzung schlüsselfertiger Lösungen in der industriellen Bildverarbeitung. Mit herausragenden Technologien und Algorithmen bringen QUISS Systeme sowie leistungsfähige Systemlösungen zur Qualitätskontrolle, Erhöhung der Produktivität und der Wirtschaftlichkeit von Produktionsprozessen einen echten Wettbewerbsvorteil und leisten einen entscheidenden Beitrag für mehr Qualität und Wirtschaftlichkeit in der industriellen Produktion.

Unsere Bildverarbeitungssysteme sind weltweit in vielen verschiedenen Industrien erfolgreich im Einsatz. Wir stellen uns vollständig auf die Wünsche jedes einzelnen Kunden ein. Wir konzipieren und integrieren unsere Systeme nach individuellem Bedarf und betreuen unsere Auftraggeber während des gesamten Projektablaufs vom Konzept bis zur Inbetriebnahme. Auch nach Projektende begleiten wir unsere Kunden partnerschaftlich mit unseren ausgiebigen Schulungen sowie Serviceangeboten.

QUISS bietet ein umfassendes Angebot innovativer Systeme für alle denkbaren Prüfaufgaben in den Bereichen:

- Klebstoff- und Dichtmittelauftragsinspektion
- 2D- /3D Lageerkennung und Roboterführung
- Vollständigkeitskontrolle
- Dosen- und Dosendeckelinspektion
- Typunterscheidung und Typsortierung
- Codeverifikation und Codelesen (GTIN, QR, DPG,..)

Kontinuierliche Innovationskraft und unternehmerischer Geist dominieren unser Denken und Handeln. Dies machte uns in diesem dynamischen und wachsenden Markt zu einem verlässlichen und partnerschaftlichen Ansprechpartner bei unseren namhaften Kunden.

Für unser wachsendes Unternehmen sind wir oft auf der Suche nach neuen, qualifizierten und motivierten Mitarbeitern. Unsere aktuellen Stellenangebote finden sie unter: http://quiss.net/karriere/

entity.description:
We are the specialists in visual inspection and identification solutions. As a reliable and enthusiastic partner, we provide turn-key solutions tailored to your specific requirements and wishes. As an integrator, we strive to implement the best-suited solution within your existing production and packaging processes. We collaborate with you as a manufacturer or OEM, aiming for a long-term partnership for the future.

We view quality assurance as “continuous improvement,” keeping it in focus and helping to further develop it within organizations.

Our ViTrack software provides full insight into inspection data and tracks all completed inspection points. The entire system can be managed from your own workstation, with data and images stored as verifiable evidence. Thanks to our API, integration with any ERP system is seamless and straightforward. Our standard modules and machines integrate smoothly into your existing operations, forming a cohesive whole within the PackCheck data platform. Our proprietary software is fully developed in-house and is 100% suitable for industrial production processes.

With inline inspection and identification, we prevent packaging machines from jamming and ensure the correct packaging materials are used throughout the process. This helps prevent (allergen) recalls and reduces waste.

Order and stock control

Automatic registration of shipments

Our goal is to enhance your customer image while reducing costs!

Feel free to contact us to discuss how these solutions can be applied to your processes and where quality assurance and improvements are possible.

We look forward to speaking with you!

M.D. Micro Detectors S.P.A. designs and manufactures electrical components. The Company offers photoelectric, proximity, ultrasonic, area sensors, safety devices, and related accessories. M.D. Micro Detectors serves customers internationally.

Industrial automation is based on detecting the presence, position, or quality of an object, in any production and logistics sector. To innovate this area and facilitate the transition to industry 4.0, the DATASENSING project was launched, which will combine the Sensor & Safety / Machine Vision Business Unit of Datalogic, a world leader in automatic data acquisition, and M.D. Micro Detectors, a company operating in the design, production, and sale of industrial sensors. TRIGO provides quality management and inspection services.

TRIGO was founded in 1997 by quality engineer, Pierre Hervo to offer quality support and conformity assessment services. TRIGO has become a globally renowned company, serving the automotive, aerospace, railway and other heavy transportation industries with more than 7000 employees throughout Europe, North Africa, Asia, and South-America.   TRIGO provides a comprehensive range of corrective and preventive quality inspection and management services. This complete portfolio enables TRIGO to implement quality solutions especially tailored to customers’ needs. Since the company’s foundation, in the previous 20+ years, the TRIGO name has become a trademark of innovation, leadership and performance in the quality management sector. Located close to our customers’ plants, our local teams provide a full range of sophisticated quality solutions in 400 sites around the world.

TRIGO provides quality inspection and management services. The Company offers containment, inspection, quality management, training, measurement, technical engineering, automotive rework, paintless dent removal, and logistics services. TRIGO serves customers worldwide.

TRIGO Group SARL provides operational quality management and consulting solutions. The Company offers containment, research, testing, pre-shipment inspection, training, and technological services. TRIGO Group serves automotive, emobility, aerospace, and heavy transportation industries worldwide.

TRIGO Group is a multinational company providing operational quality management solutions for the manufacturing sector, especially in the automotive and aerospace industries. TRIGO offers a comprehensive portfolio of quality assurance services ranging from inspection to expert audit, consulting and training.

Its headquater is in France, Nanterre.

QUALITY ALONG THE SUPPLY CHAIN

Founded in 1997, TRIGO Group is a multinational company providing quality solutions for the automotive, aerospace and other transport industries. 
With more than 10 000 employees worldwide, our company offers a comprehensive portfolio of inspection and management services to address the quality challenges of various supply chains. Operating a cutting-edge global know-how transfer network, TRIGO has become the world’s largest player in the quality sector with a growing number of subsidiaries set on 4 continents.

Comprehensive Quality solutions from Containment services to refined Quality Development packages along the supply chain (for OEMs, Tier1s and Tier2s).

TRIGO Group of companies is a company that operates in the Automotive industry. It employs 5,001-10,000 people and has $250M-$500M of revenue. The company is headquartered in Nanterre, Ile-de-France, France.

With over 25 years leading the manufacturing sorting, inspection, and subassembly operations industry, TRIGO has a proven record of providing unrivaled value and best-in-class services. We offer one simple approach: Listen. Then deliver. 

We are a privately held ISO 9001 Certified manufactured parts facilitator that uses proprietary technology-driven processes to ensure consistently accurate results, allowing for informed decisions and actions that enable seamless operations. Our testing methods and results keep vehicle manufacturing processes running smoothly, efficiently and reliably.
  
We provide superior value with our unmatched quality management services through the use of our innovative proprietary tools and technology. We offer our clients the services of our talented associates whom we equip with world-class training and instill with a spirit of collaboration. 

 We rework more than 20 million parts per year and thousands of built vehicles. This is facilitated through tight integration with our customers' systems supported by local management at customer facilities.

Our primary service market segments are:

1) TPCP - 3rd party containment provider - in this venue, we are the single source provider of containment, inspection and rework services for a typical OEM manufacturer

2) SSC2 - Supplier Site Containment Level 2 - in this service we are onsite at the supplier location providing 100% containment, inspection and rework services

3) Technical Services - Lumbee provides clients with professional quality services via Field Service representation, Quality engineers, or Quality Engineering Technicians

4) Offsite Warehouse / Containment - Lumbee has the capability to secure warehousing (with Foreign Trade Zone status if required) as a means of securing an offsite location for containing, inspecting and reworking your company's product

The company offers consulting, auditing, training, testing, technical rework, technical resourcing, resident engineering, measurement, and calibration and analysis. entity.description: Opto Engineering is the merging of old craftsmanship still needed for precision optics and fresh, innovative concepts and technologies. For Opto Engineering, “innovation” means smart design and engineering as well as a business model targeting at excellent quality/price ratios and at the fastest response to the market demands. People in our company bring their expertise to continuously improve our unique project development protocol in which optics, lighting, mechanics, manufacturing and system integration are always taken into account at every stage of the process. Opto Engineering THE TELECENTRIC COMPANY has evolved through the years, releasing hundreds of new, diverse products and developing multiple areas of expertise. Today we can say that we specialize in OPTICAL IMAGING TECHNOLOGIES. Our focus is to build and provide every single component needed to solve imaging applications: starting from the optical know-how and going through competence in lighting we can supply the best combination of tools available on the machine vision market. For all these reasons Opto Engineering has become the partner of choice in high-end optical applications for many of the major machine vision companies worldwide. entity.description:
xis.ai specializes in automating visual quality inspection and process monitoring for industrial applications using artificial intelligence and robotics. Our primary focus is on revolutionizing industrial quality inspection through advanced computer vision technology.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of software and hardware solutions designed to streamline the development and deployment of AI-powered visual inspection systems:

1. Software:
   - xis dev: A no-code platform that allows non-technical users to develop computer vision models without coding knowledge. It includes features like AI-assisted labelling, model training, and performance analytics.
   - xis Runtime: A lightweight platform for deploying computer vision models in production environments, offering real-time analytics and integration with various industrial cameras and sensors.

2. Hardware:
   - Edge AI: Deployment of AI algorithms directly on edge devices like cameras or sensors for real-time analysis and faster decision-making.
   - Support for various visual sensors: Industrial cameras, microscopes, thermal cameras, and X-ray tubes.

ZUMBACH Electronic AG is a manufacturer of on-line measuring, monitoring and control systems. We are spe­cial­ized in non-con­tact meas­ur­ing tech­no­logy.

ZUMBACH ELECTRONICS is a world-leading manufacturer of in-line measuring systems for industrial applications. We provide the most accurate, reliable, and comprehensive industrial gauging, process control, and quality/production data acquisition technology. With our extensive process and industry knowledge, we offer cost-effective solutions that help manufacturers achieve operational excellence.

ZUMBACH instruments precisely measure diameter, ovality, wall thickness, concentricity, cross section, shape, capacitance, and more. Nature of business:
ZUMBACH Electronics is one of the leading manufacturer of in-line measuring, monitoring and control systems for the wire and cable industry (from wire drawing to fiber optics, including extrusion of insulation and jackets), for the plastics and rubber induiustry (mono filaments, catheter, tubing, pipe or profiles) and for the steel and metal industry (hot and cold rolling, continuous casting, turning, grinding, polishing to QC inspection stations).
ZUMBACH instruments measure diameter (Laser Micrometers), wall thickness and concentricity (ultrasonic or eddy current principle), and detect lumps/neckdowns (optical flaw detectors). Specialized sensors monitor the capacitance of data wires and coaxial cables. - Controllers with application specific algorithms shorten start-up times, minimize scrap production and material usage. Data acquisition and FFT analysis are offered as well. A line of inductive preheaters for metal conductors, spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric, optical surface inspection system, and in-line profile monitoring systems complete the ZUMBACH line of industrial precision equipment.
• BDO AG, Biel/Bienne

Founded in 1957, Zumbach Electronics is one of the leading manufacturers of in-line measuring, monitoring and control systems for the wire, cable, plastics, rubber, steel and metals industries. The company has more than 50 employees and serves a wide range of industrial clients in the United States, Canada, Mexico and Central America. It is located in Mount Kisco, N.Y., and is a subsidiary of Zumbach Electronic AG, a privately owned company that provides in-line measurement systems based on various technologies, such as laser, ultrasonic and X-rays. The company s product line also includes preheaters for metal conductors and spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric components. It provides products of various brand names, including ODAC, ODEX, Cellmaster, Profilemaster, Simac, Metrex and UMAC.

entity.description:
All Industrial processes require inspection to ensure product quality. Faults in manufacturing, printing & packaging industries cause heavy losses and lead to wastage. Intelligent camera systems can be used for quality control.
 
Robro Systems develops camera-based inspection and monitoring solutions that are significantly more accurate than manual inspection, reducing error rate by more than 95%. 

These artificial intelligence systems increase productivity and are 30% more affordable than existing systems, ensuring everyone can provide quality assurance to their customers.

allDescriptions:
All Industrial processes require inspection to ensure product quality. Faults in manufacturing, printing & packaging industries cause heavy losses and lead to wastage. Intelligent camera systems can be used for quality control.
 
Robro Systems develops camera-based inspection and monitoring solutions that are significantly more accurate than manual inspection, reducing error rate by more than 95%. 

These artificial intelligence systems increase productivity and are 30% more affordable than existing systems, ensuring everyone can provide quality assurance to their customers.
Robro Systems provides robotic integration, machine vision, and PLC/HMI control solutions for industrial automation.

Robro Systems provides industrial automation solutions that design, build, and integrate robotic and motion systems for manufacturing lines. Offerings include robotic cells for pick-and-place, palletizing, and machine tending, along with machine vision for inspection and guidance. The company develops custom end effectors, conveyors, jigs, and fixtures, and programs PLC, HMI, and SCADA controls to connect equipment. Services cover electrical panel fabrication, system integration, and safety interlocks. Support includes commissioning, retrofits, and maintenance to optimize cycle time and yield. Robro Systems also delivers proof-of-concept builds and training to help teams adopt automation.
